schema.name: display name
schema.category: frontend | backend | mobile | qa | data | ai | infra | security | product | design | support | leadership
schema.description: short explanation of the specialization, framework, library, method, or domain knowledge
schema.tags: job titles that can learn or equip this talent

talents.name: HTML & CSS
